headline: Qnity Electronics' Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
summary: Qnity Electronics is scheduled to post its first-quarter results in May, and analysts predict a double-digit decline in the company’s bottom-line figure.

headline: Qnity Electronics shares are trading higher after RBC Capital maintained its Outperform rating on the stock and raised its price target from $139 to $150.
RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Qnity Electronics, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Qnity Electronics (NYSE:Q) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $139 to $150.
